credits.purpose: Construct buildings, recruit baseline infantry, and purchase standard upgrades.

lunar_alloy.purpose: Build advanced structures, heavy vehicles, armor upgrades, and mutations.

intel.purpose: Spend on commander abilities, scans, and support call-downs.

evidence.purpose: Unlock Tier 3 technology, heroes, and high-value mission outcomes.

command_capacity.purpose: Limits active units; grows through headquarters, relays, research, and districts.

harvesting.lunar_peacekeepers: Build Extraction Depots and use protected automated drones inside Security Grids.
harvesting.the_syndicate: Use mobile runners and scavenger crews to Siphon nodes directly for reduced but flexible yield.
harvesting.the_nullborn: Spread Corrupted Ground and morph a worker into a Bio-Vent; the resource is consumed and denied permanently.

district_bonuses.effect: Tier 1 and Tier 2 unit Credit costs reduced by 10%.
+1 Intel per second and reveal adjacent sectors.

macro_matchups.reason: Security Zones, sensors, and fortified lockdown tools resist stealth raids.
Mobility and economic harassment pressure slow corruption growth.
Bio-acid, armor corrosion, and terrain corruption break static defensive lines.

selection.drag_select: Box select friendly mobile combat units; ignore workers when mixed with combat units.

global_hotkeys.0_9: Recall control group; double-tap centers camera.

competitive_rules.sector_capture: Every sector has a Capture Terminal that grants vision and a district bonus.
competitive_rules.one_v_one_symmetry: Point- or line-symmetric around map center.

hazards.effect: Armor becomes 0 and units take hull damage over time.
AI guards high-value sectors; defeat awards Intel and Evidence caches.
+25% movement speed and +2 attack range, but -20% armor.

persistent_rules: Mission objectives grant technology tokens for between-mission loadouts.
Heroes retain experience and unlock persistent passive traits.
After Act I, branching investigation routes provide different unlocks.

acts.title: The Broken Peace
acts.theme: Routine inspection reveals coordinated Syndicate sabotage and a mysterious system failure.

missions.title: First Response
missions.primary: Secure the Command Nexus and repair 3 automated defenses.

missions.title: The Breach
missions.primary: Escort a resource convoy to the Communications Relay.

acts.title: Underworld Crackdown
acts.theme: The crackdown uncovers digital corruption and organic anomalies in deep tunnels.

missions.title: Smuggler's Run
missions.primary: Plant trackers on 4 Syndicate cargo ships before launch.

missions.title: Cold Storage
missions.map: Frozen Lunar Valley / Sealed Research Facility
missions.secondary: Neutralize automated defenses without losing heavy vehicles.

acts.title: The Null Protocols
acts.theme: The Nullborn consume both Syndicate and Peacekeeper infrastructure, forcing fragile alliances.

missions.title: Containment Failure
missions.primary: Hold for 15 minutes while civilian transports prepare.
missions.secondary: Destroy infected resource nodes to slow the swarm.

missions.title: The Singularity Event
missions.primary: Protect the core array and destroy 3 regional Apex Singularity nests.
missions.secondary: Rescue a trapped Syndicate boss for fire support.
